name: voaice
description: voaice v3 — the complete voice stack for AI: speech-to-text and signal/noise analysis in, text-to-speech and voice shaping out, forensic voiceprints, non-destructive editing, quality-tiered WAV/OGG export. Zero-dependency in-house DSP; native and neural engines load lazily and degrade honestly. The VOICE peer of faicey (the FACE).

scripts.test: node test/voicey.test.js && node test/v3.test.js && node test/python.test.js
scripts.test:all: node test/voicey.test.js && node test/v3.test.js && node test/neural.test.js
scripts.test:fast: node test/voicey.test.js && node test/v3.test.js && node test/python.test.js
scripts.capability: node -e "import('./src/index.js').then(async v=>{const t=await new v.TTS().capability(),s=await new v.STT().available();console.log('TTS',t);console.log('STT',s)})"

//deps: Core DSP (FFT, spectrometer, frequency manipulation) is IN-HOUSE with zero external deps. d3 powers the oscilloscope. Optional analysers (meyda/audiomotion) and the neural engine's onnxruntime-node (CPU, torch-free) load lazily only when present — isolated builds stay minimal. NO torch, NO transformers, NO Python.
author: Professor Codephreak <rage.pythai.net>
